$description: Component tokens for Mobile Progress Indicator — a composite component wrapping the Progress Bar with an optional label row (text + icon) above and optional helper text below. Supports 4 states: Default (active/in-progress), Success (complete), Error (failed), and Indeterminate (unknown progress). Figma Reference: Node ID 386-1891

$component.name: Progress Indicator
$component.description: A full-featured progress feedback component. Wraps a Progress Bar with a labeled header row and an optional helper text row beneath. The label row shows a text label plus a contextual icon (hourglass for active/indeterminate, check-circle for success, info-circle for error). The helper text row changes color to error/red in the Error state. Supports both stepper and continuous bar modes via the underlying Progress Bar sub-component.
$component.structure: Vertical flex column (gap: 4px) with: optional label row (text + icon, flex row), a Progress Bar sub-component, and optional helper text (single line below). Label row and helper text are individually togglable.

state.Default: Active/in-progress — hourglass icon, primary/blue fill bar at 40%, gray/600 helper text
state.Success: Complete — check-circle icon, success/green fill bar at 100%, gray/600 helper text
state.Error: Failed — info-circle icon, error/red fill bar at 100%, error/red helper text
state.Indeterminate: Unknown progress — hourglass icon, animated shimmer bar (progress-bar-intermediate.json), gray/600 helper text. Only available in non-stepper mode.

stepper.true: Segmented stepper bar. Supported for Default, Success, and Error states only (Indeterminate has no stepper variant).

variants.label: boolean — show/hide the label + icon row above the bar
variants.helperText: boolean — show/hide the helper text row below the bar

subComponents.progressBar: progress-bar.json — the determinate bar sub-component used in Default/Success/Error states
subComponents.progressBarIntermediate: progress-bar-intermediate.json — the indeterminate animated bar used in Indeterminate state

usage.contexts: File uploads, task processing, wizard completion, onboarding flows, form submission status.
usage.features: 4 semantic states, label + icon header, helper text, stepper and continuous bar variants, full HighRise design system component

gap.description: Mobile progress indicator container vertical gap - 4px (between label row, bar, and helper text row)

label.$comment: Header row — shows a text label and a contextual icon to the left. Row uses flex layout with 4px gap.

gap.description: Mobile progress indicator label row gap - 4px (between the label text and the icon)

typography.description: Mobile progress indicator label text typography - 14px Medium, 20px line-height (font/size/lg, font/weight/medium, font/line-height/lg)

color.description: Mobile progress indicator label text color - gray/700 - #344054 (consistent across all states)

size.description: Mobile progress indicator label icon size - 16px (hourglass-02, check-circle, or info-circle depending on state)

default.description: Mobile progress indicator label icon for Default and Indeterminate states - hourglass-02 (indicates active or pending progress)

success.description: Mobile progress indicator label icon for Success state - check-circle (indicates completed/successful)

error.description: Mobile progress indicator label icon for Error state - info-circle (indicates a problem requiring attention)

helper-text.$comment: Optional single line of descriptive text below the bar. Color changes to error/red in Error state.

typography.description: Mobile progress indicator helper text typography - 12px Regular, 17px line-height (font/size/sm, font/weight/regular, font/line-height/sm)

default.description: Mobile progress indicator helper text color (Default/Success/Indeterminate states) - gray/600 - #475467

error.description: Mobile progress indicator helper text color (Error state) - error/500 - #f04438 (helper text turns red to reinforce the error state)
